chapter_title.ar: حَدِيثُ أَبِي ذَرٍّ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 388)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6 / 388)
text: أَحْسَنِ مَا يَكُونُ حَالًا قَالَ سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ (عليه السلام) عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ إِذا ذُكِرَ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ اشْمَأَزَّتْ قُلُوبُ الَّذِينَ لا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْآخِرَةِ فَقَالَ وَ إِذا ذُكِرَ اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ بِطَاعَةِ مَنْ أَمَرَ اللَّهُ بِطَاعَتِهِ مِنْ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ اشْمَأَزَّتْ قُلُوبُ الَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْآخِرَةِ وَ إِذَا ذُكِرَ الَّذِينَ لَمْ يَأْمُرِ اللَّهُ بِطَاعَتِهِمْ إِذَا هُمْ يَسْتَبْشِرُونَ.

en.hubeali: H 14919 – Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Umar Bin Azina, from Zurara who said, ‘Narrated to me Abu Al-Khattab in the best of conditions that:

He asked Abu Abdullahasws about the Statement of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic: “[39:45] And when Allah alone is mentioned, (the Imamasws said it is) by the obedience to the oneasws, the obedience to whomasws Allahazwj the One has Commanded for from the Progenyasws of Muhammadsaww the hearts of those who do not believe in the hereafter shrink, and when there is a mention of the one, the obedience to whom Allahazwj has not Commanded for lo! they are joyful”.
en.sarwar: 472. Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from ibn Abu Umeyr, from Ibrahim the owner of the Barley, from Kaseer Bin Kalsama, who has narrated the following: Imam (a.s.), said, regarding the Statement of Allah (azwj) Mighty and Majestic: “[2:37] Then Adam received (some) words from his Lord”, he (a.s.) said: ‘There is no god except You (azwj), Glory be to You (azwj) our Allah (azwj) and by Your (azwj) Praise, I have acted in an evil manner and have been unjust to myself, so Forgive me and You (azwj) are the best of the Forgivers. There is no god except You (azwj). Glory be to You (azwj) our Allah (azwj), and by Your (azwj) Praise. I have acted in an evil manner and have been unjust to myself, so Forgive me and be Merciful to me, and You (azwj) are the Most Merciful of the merciful ones. There is no god except You (azwj). Glory be to You (azwj) our Allah (azwj), and by Your (azwj) Praise. I have acted in an evil manner and have been unjust to myself, so Turn (with Forgiveness) to me for You (azwj) are the Merciful Forgiver’. And in another report regarding the Statement of the Mighty and Majestic: “[2:37] Then Adam received (some) words from his Lord”, he (a.s.) said: ‘He (as) asked for (forgiveness for) the sake of Muhammad (saww), and Ali (a.s.), and Al-Hassan (a.s.), and Al-Husayn (a.s.), and Fatima (a.s.)’.
